records.ety: [L. figuratus, p. p. of figurare. See Figure.]

defs: Of a definite form or figure.
quotes: Plants are all figurate and determinate, which inanimate bodies are not.

defs: Florid; figurative; involving passing discords by the freer melodic movement of one or more parts or voices in the harmony; as, figurate counterpoint or descant.
notes: In the following example, the two lower lines are composed of figurate numbers, those in the second line being triangular, and represented thus: --
